project_context.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Modified for Automotive Tuning)
project_context.aesthetic_vibe: Aggressive, high-performance, precision, mechanical, energetic. Subtle carbon fiber textures. Asymmetrical layout.

primary_font.usage: Headings, Hero Text, Badges, Prices, Timers

secondary_font.usage: Body Text, Descriptions, Filter Labels, UI Elements

rules: Never use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or system-ui.
Headers must be tight and imposing.
All uppercase for badges and buttons with slight letter-spacing.

textures.hero: Carbon fiber texture blending into dark bottom via CSS gradient

textures.body: Hex pattern or metallic grain background (opacity 0.05)

spacing_and_layout.grid: Bootstrap 5 grid system. Use offset classes to create intentional asymmetry (e.g., .col-lg-7 .offset-lg-1).
spacing_and_layout.containers: Prefer fluid containers (.container-fluid) with generous horizontal padding (px-4 px-md-5) over strict boxed layouts.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Sharp edges (border-radius: 2px or 0px) to maintain the brutalist/industrial mechanic feel.

product_card.layout: Vertical stack. Image on top with aspect ratio 4:3. Title, price, buttons below.
product_card.badges: Position absolute top-left/right. NOU (primary bg), OFERTĂ (warning bg + timer), CEL MAI IEFTIN (success bg). Font: Rajdhani bold, uppercase.
product_card.price_treatment: Strikethrough for old price (.text-muted .text-decoration-line-through). New price in large, bold primary color.
product_card.interactions: Image scales up 1.05x on hover. Card border shifts to primary color.

filter_panel.layout: Sidebar (col-lg-3). Position sticky top to viewport on scroll.
filter_panel.styling: Surface background color. Dense padding (p-3 p-md-4). Border-right for separation.
filter_panel.inputs: Bootstrap custom forms (.form-range, .form-check). Override radio/checkbox to use solid squares or sharp ticks.

timer_offer.styling: Monospace digits (Rajdhani). Red or Yellow glow (box-shadow or text-shadow) indicating urgency. Format: HH:MM:SS.

comparison_tray.styling: Glassmorphism over dark background (backdrop-filter: blur(10px); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8)). Slide up animation on active.

hero_section.layout: Min-height 80vh. Asymmetrical split. Text heavy on left, HP Chip/Car abstract visual on right.
hero_section.overlay: Dark gradient overlay (bg-dark to transparent) max opacity 50% so background car is visible.

micro_interactions.buttons: Skewed button shapes via CSS transform: skewX(-10deg) for main CTAs. Un-skew the inner text. Add 2px solid border, transparent bg, fills on hover.
micro_interactions.theme_switch: Sun/Moon/Wrench icons for 3-theme toggle. Quick fade transition on body background.

icons.library: Bootstrap Icons for UI elements, FontAwesome for specific automotive vectors if needed.

hero_backgrounds.description: A race car with bright headlights in a dark garage. Perfect for main hero bg.
Green race car in pit lane. Good for alternate section.

textures.description: Carbon fiber texture. Use as a low-opacity repeating background or section overlay.

implementation_instructions_to_main_agen: Use Node.js, Express, and EJS as requested. Do NOT use React or Tailwind.
Compile custom SASS to override Bootstrap variables ($primary, $body-bg, etc.) based on the 3 themes.
Implement a mechanism to switch 'data-bs-theme' attribute on the <html> tag (light, dark, industrial).
Ensure all required filters (wildcard, 2x range, datalist, radio, checkbox, textarea, single select, multi select) are present in the sticky sidebar.
Use data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements as defined.
Use the provided Unsplash URLs for seeded DB data and background aesthetics.
